stages.concept:
# Unit 148: 가정법 과거완료 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **가정법 과거완료**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> If I **had studied** harder, I **would have passed** the exam.
> 만약 내가 더 열심히 공부했더라면, 시험에 합격했을 텐데.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 가정법 과거완료는 **과거 사실과 반대**되는 상황을 가정해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 형태: **If + 주어 + had p.p. ~, 주어 + would/could/might + have p.p. ~**

> If I **had known** the truth, I **would have told** you.
> 진실을 알았더라면, 너에게 말해줬을 텐데. (실제: 몰랐다)

> If she **had come** earlier, she **could have met** him.
> 그녀가 더 일찍 왔더라면, 그를 만날 수 있었을 텐데. (실제: 늦게 왔다)

> If it **had not rained**, we **would have gone** to the beach.
> 비가 오지 않았더라면, 해변에 갔을 텐데. (실제: 비가 왔다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 비교!

| | 가정법 과거 | 가정법 과거완료 |
|------|------|------|
| 가정 시점 | 현재 반대 | 과거 반대 |
| If절 | 과거동사 | had + p.p. |
| 주절 | would + 동사원형 | would + have + p.p. |

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에서 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"If you had asked me, I ( would help / would have helped ) you."
1. would help
2. would have helped ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 조건절에 'had asked'라는 가정법 과거완료(과거 사실의 반대) 형태가 쓰였으므로, 주절에도 과거에 일어났을 일을 아쉬워하는 짝꿍 표현인 'would have p.p.'가 와야 한답니다! 

🧑‍🎓 학생: 가정법 과거완료는 과거 사실의 반대! If + had p.p., would have p.p.! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 148: 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여 가정법 과거완료 문장을 완성하시오.
If I (study) harder, I would have passed the test.
> **정답** had studied

---

**02.** If she (come) earlier, she would have met him.
> **정답** had come

---

**03.** If he (know) the truth, he would have told us.
> **정답** had known

---

**04.** If I (bring) an umbrella, I wouldn't have gotten wet.
> **정답** had brought

---

**05.** If we (leave) earlier, we would have caught the train.
> **정답** had left

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If I studied harder, I would have passed the test.
(가정법 과거완료)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** studied → had studied

---

**07.** If she had come, she would met him.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** would met → would have met

---

**08.** If he had knew the truth, he would have told us.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** had knew → had known

---

**09.** If I had brought an umbrella, I wouldn't get wet.
(가정법 과거완료)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wouldn't get → wouldn't have gotten

---

**10.** If we have left earlier, we would have caught the bus.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have left → had left

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
더 열심히 공부했더라면 시험에 통과했을 텐데.
If I harder, I would the test.
> **정답** had studied, have passed

---

**12.** 그녀가 일찍 왔더라면 그를 만났을 텐데.
If she earlier, she would him.
> **정답** had come, have met

---

**13.** 우산을 가져왔더라면 젖지 않았을 텐데.
If I an umbrella, I wouldn't wet.
> **정답** had brought, have gotten

---

**14.** 진실을 알았더라면 말해 주었을 텐데.
If he the truth, he would us.
> **정답** had known, have told

---

**15.** 일찍 출발했더라면 기차를 탔을 텐데.
If we earlier, we would the train.
> **정답** had left, have caught

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
더 열심히 공부했더라면 시험에 통과했을 텐데.
If had I studied harder would I have passed the test
> **정답** If / I / had / studied / harder / I / would / have / passed / the / test

---

**17.** 그녀가 왔더라면 즐거웠을 텐데.
If had she come it would have been fun
> **정답** If / she / had / come / it / would / have / been / fun

---

**18.** 우산을 가져왔더라면 비를 안 맞았을 텐데.
If had I brought an umbrella wouldn't I have gotten wet
> **정답** If / I / had / brought / an / umbrella / I / wouldn't / have / gotten / wet

---

**19.** 일찍 일어났더라면 늦지 않았을 텐데.
If had I gotten up early wouldn't I have been late
> **정답** If / I / had / gotten / up / early / I / wouldn't / have / been / late

---

**20.** 그를 만났더라면 말해 주었을 텐데.
If had I met him would I have told him
> **정답** If / I / had / met / him / I / would / have / told / him
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 148: 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I ________ studied harder, I could have passed the
exam.
have
had
would
was
> **정답** had

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If she had arrived earlier, she __________________
the train.
will catch
caught
could have caught
can catch
> **정답** could have caught

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If they had known the truth, they ________________
differently.
acted
would have acted
will act
can act
> **정답** would have acted

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If he __________________ the alarm, he would have
woken up on time.
set
had set
sets
will set
> **정답** had set

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I had had more time, I __________________ the
project.
finish
finished
could have finished
will finish
> **정답** could have finished

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because I didn't bring an umbrella, I got wet.
If I had brought an umbrella, I wouldn't have
got wet.
If I brought an umbrella, I wouldn't get wet.
If I had brought an umbrella, I would have got
wet.
If I bring an umbrella, I won't get wet.
> **정답** If I had brought an umbrella, I wouldn't have got wet.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because she didn't study, she failed the test.
If she studied, she would pass the test.
If she had studied, she would have passed the
test.
If she had studied, she would pass the test.
If she studied, she would have passed the test.
> **정답** If she had studied, she would have passed the test.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because he didn't save money, he couldn't buy the car.
If he saved money, he could buy the car.
If he had saved money, he could buy the car.
If he had saved money, he could have bought
the car.
If he saves money, he can buy the car.
> **정답** If he had saved money, he could have bought the car.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If I had known her address, I could have visited her.
Because I knew her address, I could visit her.
Because I didn't know her address, I couldn't
visit her.
Because I know her address, I can visit her.
Because I had known her address, I could
have visited her.
> **정답** Because I didn't know her address, I couldn't visit her.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If we had left earlier, we wouldn't have missed the
bus.
Because we left earlier, we didn't miss the
bus.
Because we didn't leave earlier, we missed the
bus.
Because we leave earlier, we don't miss the
bus.
Because we had left earlier, we would miss
the bus.
> **정답** Because we didn't leave earlier, we missed the bus.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I had studied abroad, I could have learned a
lot.
If he had taken the medicine, he would have
felt better.
If she had listened to me, she didn't make the
mistake.
If we had started earlier, we could have
finished on time.
> **정답** If she had listened to me, she didn't make the mistake.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If they had practiced more, they could have
won the match.
If I had known, I would tell you.
If he had apologized, she would have forgiven
him.
If we had brought a map, we wouldn't have
gotten lost.
> **정답** If I had known, I would tell you.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I had been there, I could have helped you.
If she had taken the subway, she would have
arrived on time.
If you had asked me, I will have told you the
answer.
If he had prepared well, he could have passed
the interview.
> **정답** If you had asked me, I will have told you the answer.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
If I had more money then, I bought it.
If she called me, I would have gone.
If they had invited us, we would have
attended the party.
If he has studied harder, he would have
passed.
> **정답** If they had invited us, we would have attended the party.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
If I knew the news yesterday, I would have
told you.
If she has come earlier, she could have met
him.
If he had driven more carefully, the accident
wouldn't have happened.
If we studied more, we could have passed the
exam.
> **정답** If he had driven more carefully, the accident wouldn't have happened.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 그 소식을 들었더라면, 너에게 말해 주었을 텐데.
If I heard the news, I would tell you.
If I had heard the news, I would have told you.
If I hear the news, I will tell you.
If I had heard the news, I told you.
> **정답** If I had heard the news, I would have told you.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 지도를 가져왔더라면, 우리는 길을 잃지 않았을 텐데.
If she brought a map, we wouldn't get lost.
If she had brought a map, we wouldn't have
gotten lost.
If she brings a map, we won't get lost.
If she had brought a map, we didn't get lost.
> **정답** If she had brought a map, we wouldn't have gotten lost.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
If I had known about the sale, I would have
gone shopping.
If she studied more, she could have gotten a
better score.
If they had left on time, they wouldn't have
been late.
If he had money then, he would have bought
the gift.
> **정답** If she studied more, she could have gotten a better score., If he had money then, he would have bought the gift.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If I had woke up earlier, I
wouldn't have been late.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** woke → woken

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If she had took the bus, she
would have arrived on time.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** took → taken
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 148 가정법 과거완료중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
As he didn't own a car, he didn't drive to work.
→ If he  (     )   (     )  a car, he would 
 to work.
정답 had, owned, have, driven

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
As she wasn't kind, her friends didn't like her.
→ If she  (     )   (     )  kind, her friends would
  (     )  her.
정답 had, been, have, liked

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형 사용)
If you had bought the expensive bag, you might
have run out of money.
→ Because you  (     )   (     )  the expensive bag,
you  (     )   (     )  out of money.
정답 didn't (did not), buy, didn't (did not), run

---

**04.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (축약형 사용)
내가 조심했더라면 실수를 안 했을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) be careful, will make a mistake
If I  (     ) , I
.
정답 had been careful, wouldn't have made a mistake
(would not have made a mistake)

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 더 좋은 성적을 받았더라면 우리 부모님께서 행복하
셨을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) get better grades, will be happy
If I  (     ) , my parents
.
정답 had gotten better grades (had got better grades),
would have been happy

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리가 더 빨리 달렸더라면 그 버스를 탈 수 있었을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) run faster, can take the bus
If we  (     ) , we
.
정답 had run faster, could have taken the bus

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 가정법 과거완료 문장으로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
As he didn't fail the test, his parents were not
disappointed.
→ If he  (     ) , his
parents would  (     ) .
정답 had failed the test, have been disappointed

---

**08.** 다음 문장을 가정법 과거완료 문장으로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
Because he donated money, they were not in
trouble.
→ If he  (     )  money, they would
.
정답 hadn't donated (had not donated), have been in
trouble

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If  it  [had]  [not]  [rained]  [so]  [hard,]
[the]  [children]  [could]  [play]  [soccer.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 play → have played

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If  a  [doctor]  [arrived]  [sooner,]  [she]
[might]  [have]  [been]  [saved.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 arrived → had arrived

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 148: 가정법 과거완료 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I had studied harder, I ______________________ the test.
passed could have passed have passed will pass
> 정답: could have passed

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If she had left earlier, she __________________________________.
didn't miss the train wouldn't have missed the train won't miss the train doesn't miss the train
> 정답: wouldn't have missed the train

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I had known about the party, I ______________________________.
went would go could have gone have gone
> 정답: could have gone

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If he ______________________ the map, he wouldn't have gotten lost.
had checked checked checks will check
> 정답: had checked

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I _________ an umbrella, I _________________ wet.
had brought - wouldn't have gotten brought - wouldn't get had brought - won't get bring - wouldn't have gotten
> 정답: had brought - wouldn't have gotten

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because I didn't study hard, I failed the exam.
If I had studied hard, I wouldn't have failed the exam.
If I studied hard, I wouldn't fail the exam.
If I had not studied hard, I would have failed the exam.
If I study hard, I won't fail the exam.
> 정답: If I had studied hard, I wouldn't have failed the exam.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because she didn't take the medicine, she didn't get better.
If she took the medicine, she would get better.
If she had taken the medicine, she would have gotten better.
If she takes the medicine, she will get better.
If she didn't take the medicine, she wouldn't get better.
> 정답: If she had taken the medicine, she would have gotten better.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If he had practiced more, he could have won the match.
He didn't practice more, so he couldn't win the match.
He practiced more, so he could win the match.
He didn't practice more, so he won the match.
He practiced more, but he couldn't win the match.
> 정답: He didn't practice more, so he couldn't win the match.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I had known her address, I would have visited her.
If he had arrived on time, he could have caught the bus.
If she studied harder, she could have passed the test.
If they had saved money, they could have traveled abroad.
> 정답: If she studied harder, she could have passed the test.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I had had enough money, I would have bought the shirt.
If he had been more careful, he wouldn't have broken the vase.
If she has brought a jacket, she wouldn't have been cold.
If we had left earlier, we could have arrived on time.
> 정답: If she has brought a jacket, she wouldn't have been

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
If I knew the answer, I would have told you yesterday.
If she had not been tired, she could have helped us.
If they have prepared well, they would have succeeded.
If he had studied, he will pass the exam.
> 정답: If she had not been tired, she could have helped us.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 그 소식을 일찍 들었다면 그에게 말했을 텐데.
If I heard the news early, I would tell him.
If I had heard the news early, I would have told him.
If I hear the news early, I will tell him.
